reasoning: Valencia is extremely unlikely to win the 2025-26 La Liga. The Spanish league is heavily dominated by Real Madrid and FC Barcelona, with Atletico Madrid occasionally contending. Valencia has severely declined over the past decade due to financial problems, selling top players, and controversial management under owner Peter Lim. Recent seasons have seen them finish mid-table or fighting against relegation. Even if they had an unusually strong start to the season by October 2025, their lack of squad depth and financial resources makes a sustained 38-game title challenge nearly impossible. I am assigning the minimum practical floor of 2%.
